subject: FW: tuition
body:
From: Laura Abbott [mailto:laura.abbott@gmail.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, January 16, 2008 9:17 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: tuition

 

Dear Lesley,

I hope this email finds you well - and that you had a lovely holiday
break. I am writing to let you know that my tuition bill finally arrived
today, and I am afraid I will have to ask for a check for $25, 877.24
(made out to Weill Medical College). I cannot remember from earlier this
year whether you required a copy of the bill, but I would be happy to
fax or mail it to you. Just let me know either way. 

I do not know how much you are in contact with Jeffrey, but please send
him my many thanks and my best wishes should you have the opportunity. 

All the best,
Laura
body_html:
From: Laura Abbott [mailto:laura.abbott@gmail.com]
Sent: Wednesday, January 16, 2008 9:17 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: tuition

 

Dear Lesley,

I hope this email finds you well - and that you had a lovely holiday break. I am writing to let you know that my tuition bill finally arrived today, and I am afraid I will have to ask for a check for $25, 877.24 (made out to Weill Medical College). I cannot remember from earlier this year whether you required a copy of the bill, but I would be happy to fax or mail it to you. Just let me know either way.

I do not know how much you are in contact with Jeffrey, but please send him my many thanks and my best wishes should you have the opportunity.

All the best,
Laura
